properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: It's like a storm That cuts a path, It's breaks your will, It feels like that.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You think you're lost, But your not lost on your own, You're not alone.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I will stand by you, I will help you through, When you've done all you can do, If you can't cope, I will dry your eyes, I will fight your fight, I will hold you tight, And I won't let go.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: It hurts my heart To see you cry I know it's dark This part of life Oh it finds us all (finds us all) And we're too small To stop the rain Oh but when it rains

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I will stand by you, I will help you through, When you've done all you can do, And you can't cope, I will dry your eyes, I will fight your fight, I will hold you tight, And I won't let you fall.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Don't be afraid to fall, I'm right here to catch you, I won't let you down, It won't get you down, You're gonna make it, Yeah I know you can make it.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: 'Cause I will stand by you, I will help you through, When you've done all you can do And you can't cope And I will dry your eyes, I will fight your fight, I will hold you tight, And I won't let go, Oh I'm gonna hold you, And I won't let go, Won't let you go, no, I won't.
